title: Otstar Jar Opener Bottle Opener and Can Opener for Weak hands, Seniors with Arthritis and Anyone with Low Strength, Mutil Jar Opener Get Lids Off Easily (Blue and Grey)
description:
About this item
6 in 1 jar and bottle opener--Eight sizes of circular openings make the jar opener extremely convenient to open small and medium size lids(1-3 inches diameter), the hooks on the top can be used to open the large-size lids by breaking the air tightness, and can also be used to open the ring pull cans.
EFFECTIVE AND EASY TO USE :The long handle provides sufficient leverage, rubber lining helps provide a firm grip on the lids and the indentations on the surface provides for a firm, non-slip grip between your hand, get the lids off even the stubborn ones frustration-free and smoother. NOTE: It still requires some Strength to Grip the lids,otherwise it may slip around.
APPLICATION TIP:Both sides of the opener can be used to accommodate different sizes of lids, choose a suitable opening to fit the lid, use the third "opener ring" instead of the fourth for larger lids(No More than 3 inches).
EASY STORAGE AND CLEAN: Compact and slim, Easily put in your kitchen drawer or hang on hooks for quick access; made of high quality food grade PP and rubber, the jar opener rubber lining is easy to clean.
PERFECT GIFT FOR YOUR LOVED ONES :This ingenious kitchen gadget makes a great living aid for seniors ,arthritis sufferers or anyone with low strength, It is the perfect gift for your Mom, Dad, Grandma, Grandpa or friends if they struggle with jars.
How to Use: Please download User Manual on product details page
reviews_5s:
I just got this jar opener tool yesterday and have already used it multiple times—for pickles, canned veggies, and kimchi. It makes opening almost any size jar a breeze. This tool was intended for someone in my life with muscle weakness and poor dexterity, but the average joe would absolutely benefit to have this in his kitchen as well. Why struggle when you don’t have to? Highly functional and ergonomic. Easy to store and takes up very little space in the drawer. I absolutely love it and should’ve bought it sooner.Play Video
Sometimes when you buy gadgets, it’s hard to figure it out but when you do. It’s a lifesaver. This one was so easy the very first time. I only used it one other time before doing the video above. Three openings can fit different size jars and it is also expandable, so you can go larger or smaller if , just squeeze in or push out.

Very happy with the price and quality of this purchase. This is the perfect gift for someone that you don’t know what to get them..It's become much more difficult to open jars and bottles . . . . this thing works great!You may be really strong now or think hitting the counter with your jar works yo open stubborn jars, but someday you will need this tool, especially when arthritis arrives. Or maybe you just want top open jars now without a struggle or fuss. This tool works like a charm on a variety of jars.I bought this for my dad who has arthritis. He had one jar that he couldn't get open with any other tool. He put this on and just the pressure of the tool around the lid broke the seal even before he turned it. So fabulous tool. Good quality. It might be a bit bulky for storage, but it is flat. Quick and easy lid removal.Bought one for my parents house and another one for my Dads garage (hard telling what he will use it on) but the one end can be used to grip screws, nails etcI bought this for my mother who has arthritis and very weak hands and she loves it. She has used it many times already and she said it is awesome! She wants to buy one for everyone she knows.Nifty gadget......my wife loves it.... Just wished I would have paid more attention to the size.....most of our lids are a bit larger.This product has been really helpful for my mother. She needed something to help her open bottles and lids when she's alone, and this works perfectly. I’m definitely going to purchase another one for her.This works great - on a variety of size jars. I’m actually surprised at how well it works.
reviews_1s: Este es un aparato que consiste en un pedazo de hule duro en forma de “U” invertida, sin mayor funcionalidad para el caso que se ha comprado y que, por supuesto, no debería costar más que $1 a lo mucho …. No lo compres usuario potencial …. si vas a gastar tu dinero que sea en productos merecedores del esfuerzo…!Who writes all these raving reviews?? This thing doesn’t fit around most jar lids….and IF you can manage to pry this gadget open a little, to fit even a regular jelly jar lid, there’s no way…unless you’re the hulk..to get a grip on the ends to turn it..seriously, I honestly don’t understand where all the 5 star reviews come from? Must be people from ketchup bottle factories, idk. Anyway, save yourself the trouble…your arthritic hands will definitely hurt worse after trying out this thing.Saw a recommendation for this piece of plastic in a newsfeed article. I fell for it. Tried to use it several times. It does nothing except remind me never to fall for any article that clearly states that they may get a cut of the sale. Mybad.Does not work. I tried to use and the opener just spun on the jar lid. Does not have enough grip to open a jar. Only fits small lids, not wide moth which is what most of my jars are.Got this to be able to open mason jars and it keeps slipping off. Maybe one out of ten trys you can get it to stay on without slipping off. The problem with it slipping off, is you are expecting it to stay on so you put a lot of force onto it. When it slips off you end up smashing your thimb against the jar or your fingers get smashed together because the handles slam shut. An older person could really get hurt using this.The product did not fit the description on Amazon. It was a lot smaller than I thought it would be, and will not open large jar lids as indicated. I will be returning it.It worked adequately on some jars, but on the smaller jars it did not work at all for me. I ended up going with the battery operated jar opener, and it worked wonderfully.Unfortunately, despite reviews and videos, this jar opener had not worked for me at all. I have been unable to use it to open a jar or a bottle or a pull-top. I am elderly and do not have a strong grip, so maybe that is the problem. Very disappointed.I have been using this opener since november 2023 (13 months) and now it is broken. I can only advise against buying this inferior product.This product does not grip tight and constantly slips on jar lids. It does not open wide enough for mason jars without prying it open wider. For a person like me with mildly arthritic hands it simply does not work at all. I would not recommend and I definitely would not purchase again
